response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced full-stack and DLang software engineer, but he fundamentally lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ development experience on Windows required for this role. His only professional C++ experience was a brief 7-month stint in 2015. Additionally, he lacks deep expertise in Fixed Income or Capital Markets, making him a poor fit for this specialized financial C++ position.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience, particularly in full-stack web and DLang development.
Strong understanding of software craftsmanship, including TDD, CI/CD pipelines, and agile methodologies.
Brief exposure to the investment/financial domain through his work at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Does not meet the mandatory requirement of 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows platforms.
Lacks substantial domain expertise in Fixed Income, Fixed Income Derivatives, or enterprise Investment Banking.
No demonstrated experience with Microsoft SQL Server or Oracle databases, which are mandatory for the role.
